name: Byte
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Byte (Mark Steere, 2005): a merge-only stacking game with a checkers set on the dark squares of an 8x8 board. Isolated stacks must slide toward their closest stack; adjacent stacks merge by lifting your checker (and everything above it) to a strictly higher altitude. A stack of exactly 8 is removed and scored for the owner of its top checker; win 2 of the 3 stacks. Drawless by design.
